allow: Bash(timeout 30 node -e "const {execSync} = require\('child_process'\); try { const r = execSync\('node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit', {timeout: 25000, encoding: 'utf8'}\); console.log\(r || 'no output'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(e.stdout\); console.log\(e.stderr\); }")

Bash(node -e "const cp = require\('child_process'\); const proc = cp.spawnSync\('node', ['node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc', '--noEmit'], {timeout: 30000, encoding: 'utf8'}\); process.stdout.write\('EXIT:' + proc.status + '\\n'\); process.stdout.write\(\(proc.stdout||''\).slice\(0,3000\)\); process.stdout.write\(\(proc.stderr||''\).slice\(0,2000\)\);")
